title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Visakhapatnam-based team.

About Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions:
Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms Ventures Solutions!
